sql_fixture.redacted_sql: DELETE FROM claims WHERE tenant_id = :target_tenant_id   AND project_id = :target_project_id   AND id = :target_claim_id

assertions.name: app_role_cannot_delete_other_tenant
assertions.expected: Cross-tenant DELETE returns zero rows; ClaimRepository.delete_claim is project-scoped and rejects cross-tenant ids.

assertions.name: composite_fk_trace
assertions.expected: Tenant and project boundary checks remain compatible with (tenant_id, project_id, id) invariants.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
